s: Application to help smokers to quit smoking
d: NOTE: App repo is archived by dev. It is read-only for all users and it is no longer actively maintained. Features: * Overview: statistics about when stopped smoking, days not smoked and saved cigarettes, money and time * Health: progress of benefits when you quit smoking (breathing, cancer, …) * Diary: here you can write whatever you want. Can be backed up on sdcard.
